message:
fix(cass): add missing IsInstalled check in Timeline function

The Timeline function was missing the IsInstalled() check that all other
CASS client functions have. Without this check, calling Timeline when
CASS isn't installed would result in an unclear error instead of the
proper ErrNotInstalled error.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
